business.name: Callahan Landscaping LLC
business.tagline: Keeping Burlington yards looking their best

hero.headline: Your yard *should look this good* every week
hero.subheadline: Owner-operated lawn care that shows up on time and gets it right the first time.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Weekly mowing and yard cleanup
services_section.subheading: Everything you need to keep your property looking sharp

services.title: Landscape Design & Installation
services.description: Custom landscape design and professional installation services to transform your outdoor space with beautiful plants, hardscaping, and seasonal elements tailored to Vermont's climate.

services.title: Lawn Care & Maintenance
services.description: Comprehensive lawn care including mowing, fertilization, aeration, and seasonal cleanup to keep your property looking pristine throughout the year.

services.title: Hardscaping & Stonework
services.description: Expert installation of patios, walkways, retaining walls, and stone features using quality materials that withstand Vermont's weather conditions.

services.title: Tree & Shrub Services
services.description: Professional tree and shrub pruning, planting, and removal services to maintain healthy growth and enhance your landscape's natural beauty.

services.title: Irrigation Systems
services.description: Design and installation of efficient irrigation systems to keep your landscape properly watered while conserving water and reducing maintenance.

about.heading: Owner-operated in Burlington
about.body: Hunter runs every job personally. When you call, you get the owner — not a call center.

reviews.name: Tammy P.
reviews.text: Weekly mowings always looked amazing. Had him do brush removal too — loved the results. Very professional and reliable.

reviews.name: Breanna P.
reviews.text: Such a great experience! Keeping up with our yard was overwhelming, but they made it easy. Lawn looks the best it has since we moved in.

reviews.name: Steph M.
reviews.text: Always showed up on time, professional and easy to work with. Quality work at very fair pricing. Highly recommend!

cta.heading: Ready for a yard that looks this good?
cta.body: Get your free quote today. No pressure, just honest pricing for quality work.
